title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/engine.py (第 320 至 429 行，共 767 行) ---
 320 |                     self.context.add_message({"role": "user", "content": tool_results_content})
 321 | 
 322 |                 # 延后写入记忆提示，避免 OpenAI assistant(tool_calls) 与 tool 响应之间夹入非 tool 消息。
 323 |                 for memory_context in deferred_memory_contexts:
 324 |                     self.context.add_message({"role": "user", "content": memory_context})
 325 | 
 326 |                 # ========== 自动回滚逻辑 ==========
 327 |                 if should_rollback:
 328 |                     print(f"\n [🚨] 触发自动回滚: {rollback_reason}")
 329 |                     success, msg = rollback_to("HEAD~1")
 330 |                     if success:
 331 |                         print(f" [✅] {msg}")
 332 |                         self.context.add_message({
 333 |                             "role": "user", "content": f"⚠️ 系统已自动回滚代码，原因: {rollback_reason}。请重新思考解决方案。"
 334 |                         })
 335 |                     else:
 336 |                         print(f" [❌] 回滚失败: {msg}")
 337 |                 # ================================
 338 | 
 339 |             self.save_session()
 340 | 
 341 |         return "任务达到最大思考步数限制。"
 342 | 
 343 |     def _build_relevant_memory_context(self, query: str, top_k: int = None) -> str:
 344 |         """召回与当前输入相关的长期记忆，并按 token budget 格式化为 prompt 注入文本。"""
 345 |         if not query or not getattr(self.context, "_enable_memory_layers", False):
 346 |             return ""
 347 | 
 348 |         try:
 349 |             context = self.context.memory_manager.build_prompt_memory_context(
 350 |                 query=query,
 351 |                 token_budget=self.memory_token_budget,
 352 |                 task_type=None,
 353 |                 top_k=top_k or self.memory_recall_top_k,
 354 |             )
 355 |         except Exception as e:
 356 |             print(f" [⚠️] 主动记忆召回失败: {e}")
 357 |             return ""
 358 | 
 359 |         if context:
 360 |             print(" [🧠] 已按预算注入长期记忆上下文")
 361 |         return context
 362 | 
 363 |     def _build_pre_tool_memory_context(self, tool_name: str, tool_input: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
 364 |         """在文件编辑/写入前自动召回文件历史。"""
 365 |         if tool_name not in {"edit_file", "write_full_file"} or not getattr(self.context, "_enable_memory_layers", False):
 366 |             return ""
 367 |         path = (tool_input or {}).get("path") or (tool_input or {}).get("file_path")
 368 |         if not path:
 369 |             return ""
 370 |         try:
 371 |             context = self.context.memory_manager.build_prompt_memory_context(
 372 |                 query=str(path),
 373 |                 token_budget=500,
 374 |                 task_type="code_edit",
 375 |                 top_k=4,
 376 |                 file_path=str(path),
 377 |             )
 378 |         except Exception as e:
 379 |             print(f" [⚠️] 文件历史自动召回失败: {e}")
 380 |             return ""
 381 |         if not context:
 382 |             return ""
 383 |         return f"\n[自动文件历史召回: {path}]\n{context}"
 384 | 
 385 |     def _build_post_tool_failure_memory_context(self, tool_name: str, result_text: str) -> str:
 386 |         """测试或工具失败后自动召回错误历史。"""
 387 |         if not self._is_failure_result(result_text) or not getattr(self.context, "_enable_memory_layers", False):
 388 |             return ""
 389 |         if tool_name not in {"run_pytest", "execute_bash", "edit_file", "write_full_file"}:
 390 |             return ""
 391 |         error_query = self._extract_error_query(result_text)
 392 |         try:
 393 |             context = self.context.memory_manager.build_prompt_memory_context(
 394 |                 query=error_query,
 395 |                 token_budget=600,
 396 |                 task_type="test_failure" if tool_name == "run_pytest" else None,
 397 |                 top_k=4,
 398 |                 error_type=error_query,
 399 |             )
 400 |         except Exception as e:
 401 |           ...
